segments.text: Making it back clean is enough for that player
segments.original_text: 戻っただけ通していいですよねそういう選手的には

segments.text: Doesn't need the KO, just needs to play it out
segments.original_text: 撃墜しなきゃいいんだよね

segments.text: Spring throw won't make it in time
segments.original_text: じゃあスプリング投げは間に合わない

segments.text: Working it as a follow-up situation

full_text: Making it back clean is enough for that player Doesn't need the KO, just needs to play it out Spring throw won't make it in time Working it as a follow-up situation Taking the down hit Great reaction there!

corrections.original: じゃあスシロップ投げは間に合わない
corrections.corrected: じゃあスプリング投げは間に合わない
corrections.rule: Whisper mishearing: スシロップ→スプリング (Sonic move)
Whisper mishearing: ヒアリー→拾い
